summary: Mobile Responsiveness Audit at 375px (iPhone SE) - 9/10 pages PASS. Calendar View has horizontal overflow issue (632px doc width vs 375px viewport). All other pages (Dashboard, Settings Modal, Lead Detail Modal, Client Portal, Portfolio, Public Portfolio, Landing, Login, Signup) have proper mobile layouts with no horizontal overflow.

ui_bugs.issue: Horizontal overflow at 375px viewport - document width 632px
ui_bugs.root_cause: react-big-calendar library has minimum width requirements that don't collapse well on mobile. The component needs mobile-specific view or horizontal scroll wrapper.

ui_bugs.issue: Download button height 36px is below 44px touch target minimum
ui_bugs.root_cause: Button padding could be increased for better mobile touch experience

issues: Need mobile-friendly alternative view or horizontal scroll wrapper

passed_tests: 1. Landing Page at 375px: No horizontal overflow, hero text readable, CTA buttons tappable (48px height)
2. Landing Page comparison table: Has overflow-x-auto wrapper and min-w-[600px] - scrollable on mobile
3. Login Page at 375px: No horizontal overflow, form fits, submit button 261x48px (PASS touch target)
4. Signup Page at 375px: No horizontal overflow, name fields grid works (2 columns), legal text visible
5. Dashboard at 375px: No horizontal overflow, stat cards in 2-column grid (166px each)
6. Dashboard hamburger menu: Opens mobile sidebar correctly
7. Dashboard CRM Alerts: Readable at 343px width
8. Settings Modal at 375px: Full screen width, tabs horizontally scrollable, reduced padding
9. Lead Detail Modal at 375px: Full screen (375x771px), tabs scrollable, content readable
10. Lead Detail Modal tabs: 6 tabs with abbreviated text, horizontal scroll enabled
11. Client Portal at 375px: No horizontal overflow, progress steps stacked vertically
12. Client Portal shared files section: 343px width (fits screen)
14. Portfolio Page at 375px: No horizontal overflow, items stack to single column (343px width)
16. Public Portfolio at 375px: No horizontal overflow, grid stacks properly
17. Public Portfolio testimonials: Readable, section fits 375px width
failed_tests: Calendar View at 375px: Document width 632px causes horizontal overflow of 257px
action_items: FIX: Add overflow-x-auto wrapper to CalendarViewNew component or implement mobile-specific simplified view
OPTIONAL: Increase ClientPortal download button height from 36px to 44px for better touch targets
critical_code_review_comments: CalendarViewNew uses react-big-calendar which has fixed minimum widths. Consider wrapping in overflow-x-auto container or using a mobile-specific agenda view for screens < 640px
Most mobile CSS fixes (scrollbar-hide, flex-shrink-0, sm:flex-row patterns) are properly implemented
Settings Modal correctly uses h-full md:h-auto md:max-h-[90vh] for full-screen mobile
Lead Detail Modal tabs use overflow-x-auto scrollbar-hide for horizontal scrolling
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile responsiveness audit completed. Calendar View is the only failing component - needs overflow wrapper or mobile view. All modals (Settings, Lead Detail) work correctly at 375px with horizontal tab scrolling. Dashboard, Client Portal, and Portfolio pages are fully mobile responsive.
